Drop Rate / Post-Processing / 🎯 Talents.notes: IT top sbPlunderousKills: 5.523.413.  Formula: 1 + (talVal × log10(plunder)) / 100; talVal=4.846 (max talent level).

Drop Rate / Additive Pool / 📖 Tome / Dro.notes: IT top totalTomePoints: 50.927. base = 2 × floor((pts−8000)/100)^0.7 × multi (multi=1.13 for grim17 maxed).

Drop Rate / Post-Processing / 📖 Tome / D.notes: IT top totalTomePoints: 50.927. base = 3 × floor(pts/1000)^0.3 × multi (multi=1.13 for grim17 maxed).

Drop Rate / Additive Pool / 🐲 Summoning.notes: IT top endlessSummoningWins: 388. Win Bonus 9 (DR) scales with unique-win-count thresholds — compute via getWinBonus / threshold list.

Drop Rate / Additive Pool / 🐉 Shiny Pets.notes: IT top totalShinyLevels: 1.360. breeding system maps shiny-pet levels to per-bonus index 0 (DR).
